# ID-42: Deploy pullmd Cloud Run Service + retire current HTML extraction paths

Deploy a shared pullmd Cloud Run Service (Node.js Express + Trafilatura sidecar + Playwright sidecar ~3.7 GB; AGPL v3) across `kh-staging-494815` and `kh-prod-494815`, per the O-Q3 ratification that pullmd must remain a separately-deployed network service to preserve the AGPL network-service boundary (`docs/plans/phase-0-investigation/architecture/03-tech-stack.md` §7). Once the service is live, wire the production `PULLMD_SERVICE_URL` Secret Manager value into the cocoindex sidecar — replacing the S258 placeholder value (`https://pullmd-not-yet-deployed-staging.example.com`) that was created to unblock the cocoindex Service deploy; the placeholder cabling at `.github/workflows/cloud-run-deploy.yml:L345` assumed the Service already existed. The third scope element is retiring the HTML extraction code paths the pipeline spec (`docs/specs/cocoindex-flow-scaffolding/PRODUCT.md` Inv-9) requires to be superseded by pullmd Tier 2/2.5/3: initial inventory candidates include `lib/intelligence/content-extractor.ts:extractContent()` 4-tier cascade (Tier 2 direct-fetch + regex, Tier 2.5 Jina Reader, Tier 3 Firecrawl), the RSS `content:encoded` Turndown path, and `@mendable/firecrawl-js` / `FIRECRAWL_API_KEY` dependency — per `docs/plans/phase-0-investigation/0.8.4-pullmd-evaluation.md` §3.2 extraction-infrastructure inventory and `docs/plans/phase-0-investigation/0.9-spike-S4-pullmd-bakeoff.md` §1 bake-off verdict. A full surface inventory (including `lib/extraction/html.ts`, `lib/extraction/url.ts` HTML branch, and Firecrawl path) is the first action of {42.1} RESEARCH. Retired surfaces must be deleted with no dead-code leftover; the {42.4} PLAN.md acceptance gate verifies zero stale Firecrawl/Jina/html-extraction references post-retirement.

## Acceptance criteria

- pullmd Cloud Run Service resolves at a stable HTTPS endpoint in both `kh-staging-494815` and `kh-prod-494815`; `PULLMD_SERVICE_URL` Secret Manager value reflects the real service URL in both environments.
- HTML extraction in the cocoindex pipeline succeeds end-to-end against the deployed pullmd: one HTML/URL source file ingested via `extractContent()` pullmd adapter produces a non-empty `content_items.content` row with `extraction_method` reflecting the pullmd source header (`pullmd_readability` | `pullmd_playwright` | `pullmd_cloudflare`).
- Retired code surfaces deleted and no stale references remain: `grep -r 'firecrawl\|FIRECRAWL\|jina.ai\|extractMainContentHtml' lib/ scripts/ app/` returns zero hits after retirement migration commit (excluding test fixtures and this task's spec chain).
- `pullmd_share_id` typed column on `source_documents` is present in staging and prod schema (per `0.8.4-pullmd-evaluation.md` §5.4 Option A recommendation).
- Provenance journal in this Task cites the S258 pre-flight scope-gap discovery (Inv-9 + Inv-7 implicit dependency on deployed pullmd) as the root cause, and the {42.4} PLAN.md references `0.8.4-pullmd-evaluation.md` §10.3 Phase A stand-up estimate of ~4-6h ops.

## Dependencies

Downstream of ID-28 close (T8 canonical pipeline implementation). Sequenced after Phew Q&A first-ingest (T7) if HTML sources are in T7 scope — Planner to verify at {42.1} RESEARCH.

PRODUCT — pullmd deploy + HTML retirement behaviour spec

**Test strategy:** Every invariant acceptance-verifiable against the deployed Service + a real HTML ingest + the retirement grep gate.

**Details:**

Author docs/specs/pullmd-deploy/PRODUCT.md from RESEARCH.md. Numbered testable behaviour invariants: (a) pullmd Service resolves at stable HTTPS in kh-staging-494815 + kh-prod-494815; (b) PULLMD_SERVICE_URL reflects real URL both envs; (c) one HTML source ingests end-to-end -> non-empty content_items.content with pullmd-sourced extraction_method; (d) pullmd_share_id present on produced source_documents row; (e) post-retirement grep firecrawl|FIRECRAWL|jina.ai|extractMainContentHtml returns zero non-test hits; (f) sector-intelligence cron still ingests post-swap. Sequencing invariant: NO deletion before HTML ingest verified end-to-end through deployed pullmd. State 3 surfaces (RESEARCH §1); recommend A+B HTML branches IN, PDF/binary OUT, Q&A-parser deletion OUT/T7-gated. Carry 2 ratifications: shared-vs-per-tenant Service; extraction_method typed-column-vs-JSONB. UK English.

### ID-42.3: TECH — pullmd deploy + adapter rewrite + schema migration spec

- **Status:** pending
- **Dependencies:** ID-42.2
- **Updated:** _unset_

TECH — pullmd deploy + adapter rewrite + schema migration spec

**Test strategy:** Checker verifies one-to-one PRODUCT-invariant -> proposed-change mapping + migration idempotency + adapter contract matches verified pullmd v2.x shape.

**Details:**

Author docs/specs/pullmd-deploy/TECH.md (fresh Planner; read PRODUCT.md in full). Proposed-changes one-to-one vs PRODUCT invariants. (1) Rewrite adapters.py::_pullmd_to_markdown to GET {PULLMD_SERVICE_URL}/api?url=<encoded>, read response.text (or ?format=json), capture X-Source/X-Quality/X-Share-Id, add Authorization: Bearer if auth-on. (2) Pin httpx in requirements.txt (transitive-only today). (3) pullmd Service deploy: cloudrun manifests + image-pin (NOT :latest) + cloud-run-deploy.yml path-trigger + Secret Manager PULLMD_SERVICE_URL replace + GET / smoke-check (NOT /health). (4) Migration via supabase migration new + db push: source_documents.pullmd_share_id text NULL + partial index, + extraction_method (typed-column-vs-JSONB per PRODUCT ratification) mirroring T8 §P-4 op_id ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pattern; update docs/ontology extraction-method CV. New PL/pgSQL fns need SET search_path = public, extensions + REVOKE-anon.
